history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column F, two cells ahead and two cells to the right of my location. The cell in front is free floor space, so I can move forward safely to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 06 column F, two cells ahead and two cells to the right of my position. The cell directly in front of me is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I should turn left so that I face the open floor cell at row 07, column D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at position D7 facing upward. The path ahead (D6) is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. To find an open way to move, I will turn to the right to face east and check if the cell to the right (E7) is free to move.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 06 column F, one cell ahead and two cells to the right of my location. The cell directly in front of me is lava, which is deadly, so I cannot move forward safely. I will turn right to face the open floor cell that leads closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located at row 05, column C, which is two cells ahead and one cell to the left of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is floor (free), so I can move forward safely to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
